loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_to, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.entry_id, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.entry_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ASC
